name: Hakeem Jeffries
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $5,524,449 for Hakeem Jeffries in U.S. House, NY-08. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $5,524,449.
Public statements and congressional record context were reviewed for stance updates.
